title: Competitive Taiko Rating
about_intro_content: This service calculates and provides user skill ratings based on competition records from Donderhiroba.
about_participation_content: Participate in specified competitions held on Donderhiroba and leave records to automatically have them reflected in the ratings.
about_logic_content: Calculates relative skill levels between users based on the Glicko-2 algorithm.
about_operation_content: Ratings may be reset upon detection of fraudulent activity to ensure fair rating calculation.
